title: A New Synthesis of Royal Jelly Acid
author: O. P. VIG
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Department of Chemistry, Panjab University, Chandigarh 

  Manuscript received 11 September 1974 ; revised 18 February 1975 ; accepted 1 April 1975  

 6-Pyranyloxy-hexan-1-ol (III), obtained by the selective monopyran-formation of 1,6-hexandiol was subjected to two carbons homologation utilizing a four-step procedure to afford alcohol (VII). Oxida­tion of alcohol (VII) with Collins' reagent gives aldehyde (VIII) which was submitted to modified Wittig reaction with ethyl   α -diethyl-phosphonoacetate in the presence of NaH to yield unsaturated ester (IX). Treatment of (IX) with PTS in methnol furnishes hydroxy ester (X) which on hydrolysis with methanolic sodium hydroxide provided the title compound (I).
steps_raw:

 6-Pyranyloxy-hexan-1-ol (III), obtained by the selective monopyran-formation of 1,6-hexandiol was subjected to two carbons homologation utilizing a four-step procedure to afford alcohol (VII). Oxida­tion of alcohol (VII) with Collins' reagent gives aldehyde (VIII) which was submitted to modified Wittig reaction with ethyl   α -diethyl-phosphonoacetate in the presence of NaH to yield unsaturated ester (IX). Treatment of (IX) with PTS in methnol furnishes hydroxy ester (X) which on hydrolysis with methanolic sodium hydroxide provided the title compound (I).
